situation: audit-2026-07-01-004 finding M-001 (priority 2): test_scout_scan.test_autonomous_studio_not_excluded_from_ranking hardcodes 'autonomous-studio' in names assertion, coupling test to specific workspace layout and project naming. Violates 'test behavior not content' principle.

In worktree context without env var, subprocess tests gracefully SkipTest instead of false-failing on empty recommendations. Worktree commit 2685d13 on auto/opt-tests-1782904286 branch.
